title: Tau 9 – Te Marautanga o Aotearoa - Ministry of Education
content:
## Tau 9 – Te Marautanga o Aotearoa
Each year, rangatahi build their learning. Here is some helpful information to support their learning in Te Reo Rangatira and Pāngarau.
- Guide to Te Marautanga o Aotearoa – Tau 9 to 10
- Tau 9 – Te Marautanga o Aotearoa Pāngarau – Tau 9 Te Reo Rangatira – Tau 9
- Te Reo Rangatira – Tau 9
- Tau 10 – Te Marautanga o Aotearoa
We’re inviting whānau to share their feedback on the Parent Portal to help us improve the information and support we provide. Take a few minutes to complete our short survey.
Parent Portal survey – Survey Monkey
- Pāngarau – Tau 9 Tēnā koutou e te whānau. Nei rā ngā hau o mihi e pupuhi ana! Hei tautāwhi tēnei rauemi i a koutou ki te hāpai i te ako a ā tātou mokopuna i te Pāngarau hei te mututanga o te Tau 9 ki te kura. Find out more
Tēnā koutou e te whānau. Nei rā ngā hau o mihi e pupuhi ana! Hei tautāwhi tēnei rauemi i a koutou ki te hāpai i te ako a ā tātou mokopuna i te Pāngarau hei te mututanga o te Tau 9 ki te kura.
- Te Reo Rangatira – Tau 9 Tēnā koutou e te whānau. Nei rā ngā hau o mihi e pupuhi ana! Hei tautāwhi tēnei rauemi i a koutou ki te hāpai i te ako a ā tātou mokopuna i Te Reo Rangatira i ngā Tau 9 ki te kura. Find out more

### Te Reo Rangatira – Tau 9
Tēnā koutou e te whānau. Nei rā ngā hau o mihi e pupuhi ana! Hei tautāwhi tēnei rauemi i a koutou ki te hāpai i te ako a ā tātou mokopuna i Te Reo Rangatira i ngā Tau 9 ki te kura.
